heading: Computation of maximum amount available from Federal sources
label: 168b Computation of maximum amount available from Federal sources
text: Amounts chargeable to and available from Federal sources for inpatient and outpatient services provided through Saint Elizabeths Hospital as authorized by , 196, 211, 212, 222, 253, and 324; ; and and 251 shall not exceed the estimated total cost of such services as computed using only the proportionate amount of the direct Federal subsidy appropriated under this heading.24 U.S.C. 191131 U.S.C. 153542 U.S.C. 249See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 191, 196, 211, 212, and 222 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , (f)(2), (m), , , 3380.Pub.
